extract: Latios (Japanese: ラティオス Latios) is a dual-type Dragon/Psychic Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation III. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Latios can Mega Evolve into Mega Latios using the Latiosite. Mega Latios was introduced with Pokémon X and Y, and later made its official debut in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is a member of the eon duo along with Latias.
